核心问题

Why is LLM evaluation evolving from static benchmarks to multi-dimensional, dynamic evaluation systems?

状态

quarantined_old_runner_artifact

摘要

The article shows evaluation shifting from single-task benchmarks (GLUE/SuperGLUE) toward safety-aware, multi-dimensional frameworks incorporating robustness, alignment, and real-world applicability.
